content:
Hi everyone, we're now implementing some basic firmware-loading functionality within the Nova driver to make it work beyond the stub driver. If someone has spare cycles would be nice to sanity-check if my approach in creating and/or reusing essential wrappers for various kernel subsystems to have this feature working initially are on the right track (elf headers, struct page, vmalloc, scatterlist). I'm still fairly new to rust, thanks for the feedback!

Code located here:
https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/abj/nova-drm/-/compare/3698fbbf...28d0cbd3
you might want to post in the General channel, for things that aren't drm specific
